testcase.name: test_ai_insights

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'insights' in {'expiring_this_month': [], 'highest_risk_property': {'expiring_count': 1, 'missing_categories': ['epc', 'insurance', 'smoke_co_alarms'], 'missing_count': 3, 'overdue_count': 1, ...}, 'missing_by_property': [{'missing': ['EPC', 'Insurance', 'Smoke/CO Alarms'], 'property_id': 'dbc14314-e29e-49f4-83a3-db0bbce72e87', 'property_name': 'Edinburgh Old Town Flat'}, {'missing': ['Smoke/CO Alarms'], 'property_id': 'b0afb365-fd33-44cf-af6c-85125303a990', 'property_name': 'Victoria Terrace Apartment'}, {'missing': ['Insurance', 'Smoke/CO Alarms'], 'property_id': 'e489580f-6c3e-4c8f-ad52-439086fd371a', 'property_name': 'Cotswold Cottage'}], 'property_risks': [{'expiring_count': 1, 'missing_categories': ['epc', 'insurance', 'smoke_co_alarms'], 'missing_count': 3, 'overdue_count': 1, ...}, {'expiring_count': 0, 'missing_categories': ['smoke_co_alarms'], 'missing_count': 1, 'overdue_count': 1, ...}, {'expiring_count': 1, 'missing_categories': ['insurance', 'smoke_co_alarms'], 'missing_count': 2, 'overdue_count': 0, ...}], ...}

testcase.name: test_ai_query
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration14_refactoring.py:590: in test_ai_query assert query_resp.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
